name: Reka AI
description: Reka AI — Multimodal LLM company offering Reka Core, Flash, and Edge models with vision and language capabilities.

seo.title: Reka AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Reka AI: Reka AI — Multimodal LLM company offering Reka Core, Flash, and Edge models with vision and language capabilities.

when_to_use: Building multimodal AI apps with Reka's text, image, and video models
Accessing a competitive frontier LLM via API for enterprise tasks
Running Reka Flash for cost-effective high-throughput inference
Deploying vision-language models for document and chart understanding

cons: Smaller ecosystem than OpenAI or Anthropic
Pricing not always cheaper at scale
review.verdict: Worth benchmarking when multimodal matters, but most teams will still default to frontier labs for reliability.
review.best_for: Teams prioritizing multimodal video and image understanding
review.not_for: Text-only apps where OpenAI or Claude quality wins
